summary: Well-structured TypeScript solution with explicit types and solid error handling throughout. Workflow uses pinned actions, minimal permissions, and proper job dependencies. Weaknesses: workflow duplicates fixture input/path handling (lines 47–63 vs 65–79); bash version parsing (lines 94–96) assumes no pre-release metadata and will break on v1.2.0-rc1; bump type is re-derived from old/new versions rather than reusing already-computed decideBump() result. TypeScript modules are modular, well-commented, and maintainable. Ready to ship with minor refactoring of workflow fixture logic.
